description.value: Price 36,320 gp; Slot none; CL 9th; Weight 3 lbs.; Aura moderate conjuration DESCRIPTION Three times per day, the wielder of this +3 halfling sling staff can launch a stone (not a sling bullet) that explodes in mid-flight to create a stone call effect centered on the target square. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 18,320 gp; Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells stone call
